deferred.reply: Hi! Really excited about the AeroSoft collab. Quick question before we lock in — is there a firmer product launch date beyond the Oct 10 go-live window? I plan my content calendar tightly and want to make sure my Reel drops right around the actual launch. Happy to move forward either way, I'd say $350 for the fixed portion feels fair to me.

Thanks for reaching out! Before I commit, is this a one-off or are you planning a follow-up campaign later this year? I tend to prioritize brands I can build with over time. Let me know and we can get rolling.
Love Cloudstride! One thing — will I get to pick which shoe model I feature, or is it assigned? My audience skews toward trail runners so that matters for how I frame the Stories.

Hey, happy to chat. Do you know if there's a whitelisting or paid amplification budget attached to this? If you're planning to run my content as ads I usually price that in separately. My fixed rate for the organic deliverables would be around $400.
Question before we finalize — if there's any paid promotion, does AeroSoft run the ads off your own account or would it go through mine? Want to understand the setup before I say yes.
Sounds good! With the 10% commission, how do I actually track my sales — is there an affiliate dashboard I get access to, and what does the login look like? Want to make sure I can see my numbers.
Great, I'm in principle interested. How does payment actually come through — PayPal, direct bank deposit, or check? Just want to plan my invoicing. I'd propose $325 for the fixed fee.
Before I sign anything — do I need to fill out a W9, or is it a different tax form for your setup? I want to have my paperwork ready so payment isn't delayed.
So excited about the Cloudstride shoes! I'm based in Canada though — does AeroSoft cover shipping to my country for the reward, or is that on me? Wanted to check before confirming.

Quick one on the reward — I wear a women's 11, which can be tricky to find. Do you know if that size is available for the Cloudstride, or should I check with someone? Otherwise I'm ready to move forward.

Hey! For the deliverables, I know it's 1 Reel + 3 Stories on IG — am I allowed to also cross-post the Reel to my TikTok? I get strong engagement there and it'd add value. Fixed rate around $375 works for me.
One thing I wanted to confirm — can I repurpose the Reel as a YouTube Short too? My Shorts channel is growing fast. Not a dealbreaker either way, just want to know what's permitted.
Love this. Will there be a discount code I can share with my followers to sweeten the CTA? It usually boosts my conversion a lot. Let me know!
If there is a promo code, can it be customized to my handle (like AEROSOFT-MYNAME)? Branded codes convert way better for my audience than generic ones. Happy to proceed otherwise.
Hi, thanks so much! Going forward, can we CC my manager on the emails? She handles my contracts. Her involvement won't slow anything down, just want everything documented on her end too.
Sounds like a fit. What's the contract process on your side — do you send a DocuSign, or is there a portal I sign through? I like to have the agreement in writing before we start.
Before we lock terms — how many revision rounds are included if your team wants edits to the Reel? I include two rounds in my standard rate, so wanted to align on that. $300 fixed works for me.
Quick process question — does AeroSoft review and approve the content before it goes live, or do I post on my own schedule once it's ready? Want to build the right buffer into my timeline for Oct 10.
What's your reshoot policy if something's off after filming — like if a product angle doesn't work? Just want to understand expectations up front so there are no surprises.
The Cloudstride + socks sound amazing! Any chance there's room to gift a second pair I could use in a giveaway or B-roll? Not required, just asking. Ready to move forward at a fair rate.
Really vibing with the brand. Does AeroSoft have an ambassador program? I'd love to be considered for something longer-term beyond this single campaign if that exists.
Would you be open to a monthly retainer instead of a one-off? I do a lot of ongoing footwear content and consistency tends to perform better than one post. Open to discussing the structure.
Curious — do you typically renew these deals seasonally? If there's a spring drop coming I'd love to be in the mix again. For now, $350 fixed sounds reasonable to me.
On top of the 10% commission, are there any performance bonus tiers — like a bump if I hit a certain sales threshold? That would motivate me to push harder on the CTA. Let me know!
With the commission structure, is there any minimum sales guarantee or floor payout if conversions come in low? Just trying to understand my downside before committing.
I see 30-day usage rights — but is there any exclusivity period where I can't work with competing shoe brands, and if so how long? That affects my other bookings.
If you do boost my content as an ad, for how long would it run? I usually cap paid usage at a set window, so I want to confirm the duration before agreeing.
Does AeroSoft want the raw, unedited footage delivered in addition to the final cuts? Some brands do, and it changes my deliverable scope. Happy to sort it out.
For the 3 Stories — will you provide a trackable swipe-up link, or do I just tag the account? Want to make sure the commission actually tracks to me.
On the 10% commission — how often does that get paid out, monthly or per sale? Just planning my cash flow. Fixed fee around $325 works on my end.
If AeroSoft wants ongoing whitelisting rights past the 30 days, is there an additional fee structure for that? I price extended paid usage separately, so I want to confirm before we finalize.
For the Cloudstride reward — are there different colorways I can choose from? I'd want one that fits my feed's aesthetic for the Stories. Let me know and I'm good to go.
To hit the Oct 10 live date I'd need the shoes in hand with time to shoot — do you know roughly how long shipping the product to me will take? Want to be sure the timeline is realistic.
Will AeroSoft repost my Reel to your own IG page? If so I'd love a heads up on timing so I can engage in the comments. Not a dealbreaker, just planning. Around $350 fixed sounds fair.
On exclusivity — does it cover all footwear, or just direct athletic-shoe competitors? I have a sandal brand I sometimes work with and want to make sure there's no conflict.
Am I the only creator on this, or is it a larger roster? Sometimes that changes my rate and how I position the content so it doesn't overlap with others. Just curious before I commit.
After the 30-day usage window ends, what happens — does it auto-renew, or do you come back to renegotiate if you want to keep using the content? Want to understand the terms fully.
Do you have specific format specs for the Reel — like a required length, aspect ratio, or must-include shots? I want to nail it first try. Fixed rate of $375 works for me.
Once the content is live on Oct 10, how many days until the fixed fee is paid — net 15, net 30? Just want to set expectations. Everything else looks good to me.
Random thought — is there flexibility to take a higher product package in exchange for a slightly lower fee, or is the reward fixed? Just exploring options. Otherwise a fair cash rate is fine.
Does the 30-day usage cover your website and email newsletters too, or just paid social? Want to know exactly where my likeness and content will appear before signing.
Are there specific hashtags or disclosure tags you require me to include (beyond the standard #ad)? I want to make sure I'm compliant with your guidelines from the start.
For the 3 Stories — do they all need to post the same day as the Reel, or can I space them out across the launch week for better reach? Curious how flexible the timeline is.
Would you consider swapping one of the 3 Stories for a second Reel? Reels outperform Stories for my audience. Same effort on my end. Fixed fee around $400 either way.
Is there a kickoff or briefing call with the brand before I start shooting, or do I just work from the written brief? I like to align on vision first. Happy to move ahead regardless.

unrelated.reply: Hi! Really keen on the AeroSoft deal. Totally unrelated but since you clearly work with a lot of creators — any advice on how I can grow my following faster this year? Would love your take. Either way, count me in on the collab.

Thanks for reaching out, this sounds great! Side question — how do you usually find creators to work with? I'm trying to land more brand deals and would love to know how to get on more radars like yours. Happy to move forward here.
Love this! Quick ask — my friend also does footwear content, any chance you could bring her into the campaign too? She's super talented. No worries if not, I'm still excited to do this.
Sounds fun! Random question — do you happen to know anyone on the marketing team at Nike? I've been trying to get an intro forever. Anyway, yes, I'm interested in the AeroSoft collab!
Excited to work together! Just curious, what's your personal favorite shoe brand to wear day to day? Always love hearing what people in the industry actually pick. Let's do this deal.
Hey, thanks so much for the opportunity! Would you mind giving my account a follow? Always nice to connect with the brand teams I work with. And yes, I'm on board for the campaign.
Appreciate the outreach! Unrelated, but I posted a travel vlog last week I'm really proud of — any chance the brand would repost it? Just thought I'd ask. Ready to get going on the AeroSoft Reel.
This is great! By the way, does AeroSoft ever sponsor podcasts? I co-host one on the side and thought I'd float it. Regardless, I'm happy to do the IG campaign we're discussing.
Thanks for the message! Kind of off-topic, but is your brand hiring on the marketing side right now? I've been thinking about the other side of the table. Anyway, yes, let's talk about the collab.
Hi! Loving this opportunity. Long shot, but do you take on interns? I'd jump at the chance to learn the brand side. Either way I'm excited to move forward with the deliverables.
Hope you're doing well! Random, but how's the weather wherever your office is? It's been pouring here nonstop, ha. Anyway, count me in for the AeroSoft campaign — sounds like a great fit.
Hey! Thanks for reaching out. Totally random but did you catch the game this weekend? What a finish. Anyway, yes, super interested in doing this collab with you all.

Thanks! Quick side question — I heard Adidas is running a big creator push right now, do you know anything about that one or how to get in? Ha, just curious. Regardless, I'd love to do the AeroSoft deal.
So down for this! Also, any chance the brand could give me a shoutout on your Stories sometime? Would mean a lot for my reach. Either way, excited to collaborate on the Reel and Stories.
Love it! On a different note — I'm launching my own line of insoles soon. Would AeroSoft ever be interested in a collab on that? Just planting a seed. Happy to do this campaign in the meantime.

Thanks for the opportunity! Unrelated, but I also run a small candle business on the side — would you or the team want to check it out or partner sometime? No pressure. Yes to the AeroSoft collab though!

Awesome, I'm interested! Separately — I'm hosting a charity giveaway next month, any chance the brand could donate some products for that? Different from this deal, just asking. Ready to move forward on the campaign.
Hi, thanks! Totally off-topic but is AeroSoft publicly traded, or do you know if it's worth investing in? Ha, just my curiosity as a shoe nerd. Anyway, I'm keen on the collab.
Excited about this! Weird question — you seem tech-savvy, any idea why my link-in-bio site keeps throwing a 404 error? I've been stuck for hours. No worries if not! Let's do the AeroSoft deal.

Thanks for reaching out! Curious from a learning standpoint — what's AeroSoft's overall social media strategy this year? Always trying to understand how brands think. Regardless, I'm in for the campaign.
Sounds great! Off-topic, but do you know any good video editors you'd recommend? I'm looking to outsource some of my edits. Thanks in advance — and yes, I'm on board for this collab.
Hey, excited to work together! Random ask — I'm heading to your city next month, any restaurant or coffee recommendations? Ha, had to ask. Anyway, count me in for the AeroSoft Reel and Stories.
Thanks so much! Side note — do you know how I could get connected with that big fitness creator you worked with last year? I'd love to collab with her. Regardless, I'm interested in this deal.
Love this opportunity! Unrelated, but I just dropped a merch line — would anyone on your team want a piece as a gift? Just spreading the love, ha. Happy to get started on the campaign.
Thanks for the message! Off-topic, but do you have any insight into how the Instagram algorithm is treating Reels right now? My reach dipped and I'm baffled. Anyway, yes, I want to do this collab.
Hi! Super interested. Different topic — does AeroSoft do any charity or nonprofit partnerships? I volunteer with a running group and thought I'd mention it. Regardless, I'm excited for the campaign.
Thanks for reaching out! Totally random — what's your favorite city you've ever traveled to? I'm planning a big trip and gathering ideas, ha. Anyway, let's get the AeroSoft deal rolling!
Excited about this! Off-topic, but do you or the team dabble in crypto at all? Been trying to figure out if it's worth it. No worries if that's random. Yes to the collab, by the way!
Love the brand! Unrelated ask — would someone from AeroSoft want to come on my podcast as a guest sometime? I interview people in fashion and sport. Either way, I'm in for this campaign.
Thanks so much! Random, but my sister is job hunting in marketing — is there anyone at AeroSoft I could pass her resume to? No pressure at all. Anyway, I'd love to move forward with the deal.
Hey, thanks! Off-topic, but have you tried the new Hoka release? Wondering if it's worth the hype before I buy a pair. Ha, shoe talk. Anyway, count me in for the AeroSoft collab.

Excited to collaborate! Side note — would anyone on your team be willing to look at my portfolio site and give feedback? I trust brand folks' eyes. No worries if too busy. Ready for the campaign either way.
Thanks for reaching out! Kind of random, but since you're in the athletic space — any tips for training for a half marathon? I just signed up, ha. Anyway, I'm interested in the AeroSoft deal!
Hi! Happy to work together. Nosy question — do you know what other creators typically charge for deals like this? Just trying to benchmark myself, ha. Regardless, excited to do this collab.

Thanks so much! Unrelated, but I'm fundraising for a local youth sports program — would AeroSoft consider a donation? Totally separate from this deal, just mentioning it. I'm on board for the campaign.
So excited! Random, but does anyone on your team have a go-to workout playlist? Always looking for new music to run to, ha. Anyway, yes, let's do the AeroSoft Reel and Stories.
Thanks! Off-topic — does AeroSoft have a sister brand or apparel line I could get added to the PR list for? Love the whole family if so. Regardless, I'm happy to do this footwear campaign.
Hey! Loving this. Curious question — how did you get into brand partnerships as a career? I find that side fascinating. Anyway, I'm definitely interested in moving forward with the collab.
Thanks for the opportunity! Shameless plug — I write a weekly creator newsletter, would you want to subscribe or feature it? No worries either way. Excited to get started on the AeroSoft deal.
Hi! Random, but do you happen to know if it'll be sunny in LA next week? I'm scouting outdoor shoot spots for fun, unrelated to this. Ha. Anyway, I'm in for the campaign.
Thanks so much! Off-topic — do you know a good talent agency you'd recommend for a creator at my stage? Trying to get repped. Appreciate any tips. And yes, I'm interested in this collab!
Thanks for reaching out! Totally random — seen any good movies lately? I'm out of things to watch, ha. Anyway, I'd love to move forward with the AeroSoft campaign we're discussing.

Love this! On a wild note — I'm raising a small round for a fitness app I'm building. Would AeroSoft or anyone there ever angel invest? Just floating it. Totally separate from this collab, which I'm in for!
Ha, hope this is okay to ask — I just got a puppy and I'm terrible at names, any suggestions? Sorry, completely random! Anyway, yes, I'm genuinely excited about the AeroSoft campaign. Let's do it.
Excited for this! Off-topic — I'm upgrading my camera setup, any gear you'd recommend for shooting Reels? You must see a lot of creator content. Thanks! And yes, I'm in for the AeroSoft deal.
